Helping People Find

welcome.title: Helping people find and follow Jesus
welcome.text: Christ Synagogue Ministries is a vibrant community of believers in Arusha, Tanzania, dedicated to transforming lives through the power of the Holy Spirit under Prophet Baraka David Ogillo.
welcome.missionText: To glorify God and make disciples of all nations through the power of the Holy Spirit.
welcome.visionText: A thriving community transformed by God’s love across Tanzania and beyond.
welcome.valuesText: Faith, Integrity, Community, and Excellence — the pillars that guide everything we do at CSM.

sermons.subtitle: Latest Sermons
sermons.title: Powerful Word for Your Journey
sermons.intro: Watch the newest messages from Prophet Baraka David Ogillo.

features.title: Thursday Service
features.text: Worship and ministry every Thursday at 6:00 PM EAT in Arusha.

features.title: Saturday Service
features.text: Fellowship, worship, and spiritual growth every Saturday at 2:00 PM EAT.

features.title: Sunday Service
features.text: Worship, prophetic ministry, and teaching of God's Word at 10:00 AM EAT.

visit.title: Find your way to CSM
visit.welcomeText: Christ Synagogue Ministries gathers throughout the week in Arusha to worship, pray, and grow together in faith. We would love to welcome you this week.

give.title: Ways to Give
give.intro: Give with a willing heart. Your generous support enables us to continue spreading the Gospel and transforming lives.
give.trustNote: Only give using the account details published on www.csm.church. Never send money to anyone who claims to represent CSM via private messages or unofficial links.
give.verse: “Give, and it will be given to you. A good measure, pressed down, shaken together and running over, will be poured into your lap.”

testimonials.subtitle: Testimonies
testimonials.title: Lives transformed by Jesus
items: I came to CSM broken and without hope. Through the power of prayer and the Word of God, Jesus completely transformed my life. He restored my family and gave me a new purpose in Him.
The presence of God at Christ Synagogue Ministries is tangible. Jesus has deepened my faith through His Word, and I have seen His power change my heart in ways I never imagined.
Jesus healed me, delivered me, and filled me with a fresh anointing. What God spoke over my life was precise and life-changing. At CSM I have witnessed the miracles of Jesus.

video.title: Come experience the presence of God with us

features.title: Worship With Us
features.text: Experience dynamic praise and the presence of God in every service.

features.text: Be transformed by the teaching of God’s Word each week.

features.title: Find Your Purpose
features.text: A Spirit-filled community helping people find and follow Jesus.

about.title: A church called to transform lives
about.text: Christ Synagogue Ministries was founded under the divine calling of Prophet Baraka David Ogillo in Arusha, Tanzania. What began as a small gathering of faithful believers has grown into a vibrant Spirit-filled community that impacts thousands of lives.
about.highlight: We are not just building a church; we are building a movement of transformed lives.
focus: Discipleship that helps people follow Jesus
A loving church family in Majengo, Arusha

beliefs.title: The heart of Christ Synagogue Ministries
beliefs.intro: Our life together is shaped by the Word of God, the power of the Holy Spirit, and a deep desire to help people find and follow Jesus.

pillars.title: Worship
pillars.text: We gather to exalt Jesus with passionate praise and a hunger for His presence in every service.

pillars.title: The Word
pillars.text: We teach Scripture with clarity and power so every believer can grow strong in faith.

pillars.title: Prophetic Ministry
pillars.text: We create room for the Holy Spirit to speak, heal, deliver, and give direction for life.

pillars.title: Community
pillars.text: We walk together as a family — welcoming every person into love, prayer, and purpose.

beliefs.verse: "For the kingdom of God is not a matter of talk but of power."
